data.body: AC amendment: When editing .test-index, also remove tests/hooks/test-sub-agent-guard.sh from the comma-separated test lists on both line-203 and line-283 entries for plugins/dso/skills/design-wireframe/SKILL.md (these entries include test-sub-agent-guard.sh, but design-wireframe is no longer covered by that test after task 6c54-9498). The 4 RED markers should be placed in the context of the test-design-skills-cross-stack.sh entry.
